headline: How The FactSet (FDS) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Competition And Valuation Resets
summary: FactSet Research Systems is in focus after the modeled fair value was revised from US$280.06 to US$253.31, pointing to a lower implied valuation level in the latest update. Analysts linking this shift to recent Street research are weighing concerns about competitive pressures and how artificial intelligence might affect growth expectations against views that Q2 performance reflects competitive wins and pricing support. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving...
